name: GH_SeparatorDisplay
summary: Enumerates all possible display modes for horizontal and vertical separators.

enum_values.name: Etched
enum_values.summary: A double line etched separator is drawn.

enum_values.name: EtchedFading
enum_values.summary: A double line etched separator with fading extremes is drawn.

enum_values.name: Dashed
enum_values.summary: A single line dashed separator is drawn.
